verses.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਬਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
verses.hindi: सो दरु केहा सो घरु केहा जितु बहि सरब समाले ॥
verses.english: What is that door, and what is that house, in which You sit and take care of all?
verses.translation: What is that gate, what is that dwelling, wherein You sit and care for all?

verses.gurmukhi: ਵਾਜੇ ਨਾਦ ਅਨੇਕ ਅਸੰਖਾ ਕੇਤੇ ਵਾਵਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
verses.hindi: वाजे नाद अनेक असंखा केते वावणहारे ॥
verses.english: Countless musical instruments of so many various kinds play there; so many are the players.
verses.translation: Countless musical instruments of innumerable kinds are played; so many are the musicians.

verses.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਰਾਗ ਪਰੀ ਸਿਉ ਕਹੀਅਨਿ ਕੇਤੇ ਗਾਵਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
verses.hindi: केते राग परी सिउ कहीअनि केते गावणहारे ॥
verses.english: So many Ragas, with their accompaniments, are mentioned there; so many are the singers.
verses.translation: So many ragas with their companions are mentioned; so many are the singers.

verses.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਰਾਜਾ ਧਰਮੁ ਦੁਆਰੇ ॥
verses.hindi: गावनि तुधनो पउणु पाणी बैसंतरु गावै राजा धरमु दुआरे ॥
verses.english: The wind, water and fire sing of You. The Righteous Judge of Dharma sings at Your door.
verses.translation: The wind, water and fire sing of You. Dharmaraj sings at Your door.

verses.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਚਿਤੁ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਲਿਖਿ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਧਰਮੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
verses.hindi: गावनि तुधनो चितु गुपतु लिखि जाणनि लिखि लिखि धरमु वीचारे ॥
verses.english: Chitr and Gupt, who record the accounts of actions, sing of You; they know and write what is written and contemplate Dharma.
verses.translation: Chitr and Gupt, who record the account of deeds, sing of You; they write and contemplate Dharma.
